entries.name: Clear conditions
entries.description: Good visibility around Baldur’s Gate; locals go about normal business.

entries.name: Light wind
entries.description: A noticeable breeze carries smells, sounds and rumours through Baldur’s Gate.

entries.name: Heavy cloud
entries.description: The sky presses low over Baldur’s Gate, making colours dull and tempers short.

entries.name: Sudden rain or snow
entries.description: A quick change in weather disrupts travel and street life in Baldur’s Gate.

entries.name: Difficult visibility
entries.description: Mist, glare, spray or blowing dust makes distance hard to judge near Baldur’s Gate.

entries.name: Unsettled omen
entries.description: Animals, sailors or locals notice something odd in the air around Baldur’s Gate.

entries.name: Harsh weather
entries.description: Travel around Baldur’s Gate becomes tiring; checks may be needed if the party pushes on.

entries.name: Dangerous weather
entries.description: A storm, whiteout, heat surge or violent squall creates immediate complications at Baldur’s Gate.
